'''jabodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yachtsfolk|yachtsfolk]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yachtsfolk|yachtsfolk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jabodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæbedheth|jæbedheth]] || [[word:jæbedhej|jæbedhej]] || [[word:jæbedhesh|jæbedhesh]] || [[word:jæbedhe|jæbedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabobodhoth|jabobodhoth]] || [[word:jabobodhoj|jabobodhoj]] || [[word:jabobodhosh|jabobodhosh]] || [[word:jabobodho|jabobodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabodhoth|jabodhoth]] || [[word:jabodhoj|jabodhoj]] || [[word:jabodhosh|jabodhosh]] || [[word:jabodho|jabodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabofdhoth|jabofdhoth]] || [[word:jabofdhoj|jabofdhoj]] || [[word:jabofdhosh|jabofdhosh]] || [[word:jabofdhof|jabofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jabodhotho|jabodhotho]] || [[word:jabodhojo|jabodhojo]] || [[word:jabodhosho|jabodhosho]] || [[word:jabodhoko|jabodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jabodhoth|jabodhoth]] || [[word:jabodhoj|jabodhoj]] || [[word:jabodhosh|jabodhosh]] || [[word:jabodho|jabodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jabodhothol|jabodhothol]] || [[word:jabodhojol|jabodhojol]] || [[word:jabodhoshol|jabodhoshol]] || [[word:jabodhokol|jabodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jabodhothotho|jabodhothotho]] || [[word:jabodhojojo|jabodhojojo]] || [[word:jabodhoshosho|jabodhoshosho]] || [[word:jabodhoko|jabodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jabodhothon|jabodhothon]] || [[word:jabodhojon|jabodhojon]] || [[word:jabodhoshon|jabodhoshon]] || [[word:jabodhokon|jabodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jabodhothoro|jabodhothoro]] || [[word:jabodhojoro|jabodhojoro]] || [[word:jabodhoshoro|jabodhoshoro]] || [[word:jabodhokoro|jabodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
